scripts.ready: vp run check && vp run test && vp run -r build
scripts.check: vp run verify:zero-schema && vp run web#generate:api && vp check
scripts.test: vp run @cove/db#generate:zero && vp run web#generate:api && vp run --filter './packages/**' --filter './apps/api' test && vp run web#test && vp run @cove/acceptance#test
